html:
Exclusive to:

“Sturdy, dependable, and loved by moustachioed strongmen.”

– W

For detailed farming informations, see Farm Plant.

The Potato Plant is an object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Reap What You Sow update. It can be obtained by planting Fluffy Seeds (also named Potato Seeds, if researched with the Gardeneer Hat) into Farm Soil or on the ground as Wormwood. There is a chance to grow a Potato Plant by planting regular Seeds.

The plant's favourite seasons are Autumn, Winter and Spring, so in Summer it will grow slower and accumulate more Stress points. It is a water efficient plant that consumes only 3.6 units of ground moisture per day. When planted adds 1 unit of Growth Formula and 1 unit of Compost while draining 2 units of Manure.

When harvesting in the full stage, it will give 1 Potato and 0-2 Fluffy/Potato Seeds depending on the amount of stress points the plant accumulated. It can also grow into a Giant Potato, if the plant accumulated only 0-1 stress points. When picked and hammered, it will drop 2-3 Potatoes and 2-3 Fluffy/Potato Seeds.

The Potato stays 4 days on the plant before rotting and the Giant Potato stays 6 Days on the plant. If it has been planted by Wormwood, it lasts 50% longer before spoiling. Picking the plant in its rotten stage will give 1 Rot (normal) or 3 Rot and 1 Potato Seed (giant). After 4 to 5 days of being in the rotten stage, a non-giant Potato Plant grows back, but the new plant cannot become giant.

When picking up a rotten plant, a Fruit Fly has a 5% chance to spawn.

Gallery

  • Potato Plant in Plant Registry.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

{{for|detailed farming informations|Farm Plant}}

The '''Potato Plant''' is an object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in the ''[[Reap What You Sow]]'' update. It can be obtained by planting [[Crop Seeds/DST#Fluffy Seeds|Fluffy Seeds]] (also named Potato Seeds, if researched with the [[Gardeneer Hat]]) into [[Farm Soil]] or on the ground as [[Wormwood]]. There is a chance to grow a Potato Plant by planting regular [[Seeds]].

The plant's favourite seasons are [[Autumn]], [[Winter]] and [[Spring]], so in [[Summer]] it will grow slower and accumulate more [[Farm Plant#Stress|Stress]] points. It is a water efficient plant that consumes only 3.6 units of [[Farm Plant#Ground Moisture|ground moisture]] per day. When planted adds 1 unit of Growth Formula and 1 unit of Compost while draining 2 units of Manure.

When harvesting in the full stage, it will give 1 [[Potato]] and 0-2 Fluffy/Potato Seeds depending on the amount of stress points the plant accumulated. It can also grow into a [[Giant Crops#Giant Potato|Giant Potato]], if the plant accumulated only 0-1 stress points. When picked and [[hammer]]ed, it will drop 2-3 Potatoes and 2-3 Fluffy/Potato Seeds.

The Potato stays 4 days on the plant before rotting and the Giant Potato stays 6 [[Day]]s on the plant. If it has been planted by Wormwood, it lasts 50% longer before spoiling. Picking the plant in its rotten stage will give 1 [[Rot]] (normal) or 3 Rot and 1 Potato Seed (giant). After 4 to 5 days of being in the rotten stage, a non-giant Potato Plant grows back, but the new plant cannot become giant.

When picking up a rotten plant, a [[Fruit Fly]] has a 5% chance to spawn.
